transcript.clean_text: stage 17 of the Tour of France had seen a battle to the Finish between the top two the man in second place won the stage Yas fero only lost 4 seconds however in his quest to keep the yellow Jersey well if F be on their knees asking for divine intervention to get through as they left Lord on stage 18 of the tour this year's final Mountain Stage all that was a little too late for three non-starters with covid heartbreakingly forced to leave the race were Chris F Damiano kuso and Immanuel ITI so the jerseys lined up one final day in the Pyrenees otam the destination for the first time in 8 years 143.5 km with most of the climb again coming in the second half of the day the mighty obisque or category the first ever appearance of the cus Pondel and then otam returning to the tour for the first time since Vino neol was the winner in 2014 the final test and a regular climb with plenty of changes of gradient at 1500 m above sea level high in the Pyrenees the main differences in the tour were set to be decided once again it was a full gas start King of the mountain zimon gesu was hoping to get up the road and he' hoped he'd be allowed a little bit of leeway but once again there was a real fight Julio Chi cor looked in Prime position to take the polka dot Jersey when he went over the or category obisque first and took 20 points but on The Descent it was hotting up behind first AR samik and then UAE trying to put the pressure on Yas fingle bingle's teammate wal fat was up the road and just under 40 km remained when T poacha put in the first of several attacks SE cus returned to lend a hand but the attacking didn't stop there naido quintano was looking for a helping hand one for the V later on a garant Thomas even went on his own before pgat was at it once again unable to get rid of vagor however the attacks came and no result came onto the final Descent of the day one of the trickiest in the tour and a hiccup for vingua he had an issue Pacha attacked Pacha then had an issue Vore would be the man to wait very sportingly a fine rivalry off the bike a friendly one gentlemanly conduct on that final descent so we came to the final climb 2 minutes 14 seconds from what was left of the late forming Breakaway Martinez Pino and fard back to the yellow Jersey group The GC game was settling into shape the big change of the day godu rising up above of naido kintana alanar attacked and dropped Pino there would be no French stage win 37 stages in counting garine Thomas once again distance but he'd once again ride his own race and hang on safely to that third spot and once cus was done fat was there to lend a hand this was the moment that Yambo visma were going to win the Tour this was the moment with 4 and2 km to go that a gap opened up between vagor and Pacha Pacha throwing the punches vagor riding away Fat's job was done with 3 and A2 kilm to go and yonas vagor rode through the Sea of supporters to probable tour the France victory at this point putting in around a minute to Pacha Vore victorious in yellow and baring any bizarre turnaround on his way to winning the Tour of France in 3 days Bacha didn't stop fighting but losing a minute and 4 seconds on the line another further four bonus seconds with wart putting in one of the performances of his career garine Thomas continue to ride on a great tour at 36 years of age and David godo having a very good day he'd move from fifth to Fourth the podium though not looking that close a possibility two warriors fighting for yellow last year Pacha this year it looks like being vor's year and how fitting with this year's tour to France having started in v go native Denmark a minute and four is margin of Victory on the day fat third on the top of an all category Mountain Stage that in the green jersey as well garant Thomas David gou in the top five on the day and yonas Vago with a yellow Jersey that fits him even better with two flattish stages and a time trial still to go a very handsome lead of 3 minutes and 26 seconds now over bachan with Thomas in third at 8 minutes guu now 11 5 the gap's huge in the top 10 now 20 minutes and 17 seconds from first to 10th heartbreak though for zimon Gesa as vor's stage win also meant that he'd be the king of the mountains an eight-point lead for Vore but not enough points on the road now for vagor to seed that Jersey stage 19 looks like this with the Pyrenees and mountains in the distance 188 km mainly flat with a couple of fourth category climbs towards the end a day maybe for the Breakaway or even one for the sprinters it's on the way to GA where the tour to France next moves stage 19 will be live and On Demand on gcn Plus
